decisions.title_en: Amazon to invest up to $25B more in Anthropic, 5GW compute deal
decisions.reason: New deal announced 04-20: $5B upfront + $20B milestone-tied at $380B valuation; Anthropic commits >$100B to AWS over 10 years; 5GW Trainium capacity. Not in lookback.

decisions.title_en: Moonshot launches Kimi K2.6: 1T param, 58.6% SWE-Bench Pro, 300 sub-agents
decisions.reason: Open-source release 04-21. 1T param MoE, 32B activated, beats GPT-5.4/Claude Opus 4.6 on SWE-Bench Pro. 300 parallel sub-agents, 4000 step chains. Not in lookback.

decisions.title_en: Anthropic $30B ARR tops OpenAI $24B on enterprise spend
decisions.reason: Previously published 04-13 as 'OpenAI高管泄露备忘录指控Anthropic虚增80亿美元营收' based on leaked OpenAI memo. New development 04-21: fresh Ramp/Menlo Ventures data confirms Anthropic has actually surpassed OpenAI on enterprise gen-AI spend with $30B ARR vs OpenAI's $24B. Axios and Sherwood both covered the business win with new data points (share of enterprise spending, consumer use surge). Substantively new information.

decisions.title_en: Microsoft shifts GitHub Copilot to token-based billing, pauses new sign-ups
decisions.reason: GitHub announced 04-20: pauses new Copilot Pro/Pro+/student sign-ups, shifts to token-based billing. Reason: agentic workflows doubled WoW cost. Not in lookback.

decisions.title_en: Anthropic Q1 lobbying $1.6M beats OpenAI $1M, biggest quarter ever for both
decisions.reason: Q1 2026 federal lobbying disclosures released 04-21: Anthropic $1.6M, OpenAI $1M — biggest-ever quarters for both, Anthropic outspends for the first time. Not in lookback. Distinct from revenue/enterprise narrative.

decisions.title_en: YouTube expands AI likeness detection to celebrities, talent agencies
decisions.reason: YouTube announced 04-21: deepfake detection tool expanded from creators to celebrities, with CAA, UTA, WME, Untitled Management on board. Not in lookback.

decisions.title_en: SoundHound buys LivePerson for $43M to merge voice AI with 1B/mo messages
decisions.reason: All-stock M&A announced 04-21: $43M equity, $250M enterprise value, projected $350-400M 2027 revenue. Not in lookback.

decisions.title_en: Tesla launches fully unsupervised Robotaxi in Dallas and Houston
decisions.reason: Service launched 04-18 (within 5-day window). First no-human-monitor robotaxi rollout in Texas cities where Waymo already operates, 573 vehicles, timed ahead of 04-22 Q1 earnings. Not in lookback.

decisions.title_en: China X Square Robot closes ~$276M Series B for embodied AI
decisions.reason: RMB 2B (~$276M) Series B closed 04-20 — one of the day's largest deep-tech financings, embodied AI for general-purpose robots. Not in lookback.

decisions.title_en: OpenAI ships 'Codex for (Almost) Everything' with background Computer Use
decisions.reason: event_date 2026-04-16 is 6 days old (>5 day limit). Rollout covered by other channels.

decisions.title_en: Anthropic requires government ID + live selfie for some Claude users
decisions.reason: event_date 2026-04-16 is 6 days old (>5 day limit).

decisions.title_en: Google in talks to deploy Gemini in Pentagon classified settings
decisions.reason: event_date 2026-04-16 is 6 days old (>5 day limit). Negotiations still ongoing; no new breakthrough to report.
